meaning: n.克什米尔北部人民所用的藏缅语
examples: The Balti find westerners’ emphasis on time confusing.
The Balti find westerners' emphasis on time confusing.
I know nothing about the Balti language, but I recognize the tone of Mortenson's statement.
It is important to know that Balti people have a completely different notion about time.
On 11 August racist graffiti was scrawled on a Singaporean restaurant in Market Place, and on 31 October bricks were thrown at a Balti restaurant in Market Place.
